div.p:
Physical and logical network topology of the homelab.
The UDM Pro manages 5 VLANs. pve-01 connects directly to the UDM Pro
via two NICs: vmbr0 (VLAN 5 management) and vmbr1 (full VLAN trunk).
pve-01 hosts all clusters and standalone services as Proxmox guests.
Talos VMs use a dual-NIC design: eth0 on vmbr1 for Cilium L2
LoadBalancer ARP announcements, eth1 on the shared vnet-talos
SDN VNet for inter-node traffic (kubelet, etcd).

g.title: UniFi Dream Machine Pro — L3 gateway, DHCP, inter-VLAN firewall
UniFi Access Point — SSID-to-VLAN mapping (Home/Guest/IoT)
IoT devices
Proxmox hypervisor — 2 physical NICs, both connected directly to UDM Pro

g.text: internet blocked by default — HASS has a VLAN-level internet exception

g.title: PVE OS management bridge — VLAN 5 only (static 10.0.0.11)
Trunks all VLANs to guest VMs and LXC containers
Shared VXLAN VNet (vnet-talos) for all Talos clusters — SNAT to Proxmox API
Dual-NIC Talos VMs — separate Cilium L2 and node traffic planes
Omni cluster manager — API, dashboard, Wireguard tunnel
Observability — VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs, Alertmanager
OCI container registry (Zot)
Prometheus PVE exporter — scrapes Proxmox API
Omni infrastructure provider for Proxmox — provisions Talos VMs
Shared node traffic (eth1) for all Talos/Omni clusters — kubelet, etcd, inter-node

text.tspan: No node IP — L2 ARP only

g.title: Cilium L2Announcement ARP responses for lungmen.akn's /29 slice of the /26 pool
